name: Season X Skin Swapper
author: Made by Unknown
cardDescription: Allows you to swap your skin mid-game with a menu in Fortnite v10.00-10.40
description:
Allows you to swap your skin mid-game with a menu in Fortnite v10.00-10.40

**How To Use:**
- Once you are fully in game click the `L` key
- The menu should appear allowing you to choose a skin and backbling
- The skin shows up for players without the pak
